title: Anthropic Economic Index Dataset
how_used: Claude.ai Free/Pro country-level usage_count proxy; used as one observable regional usage signal.
limitations: Provider-specific; undercovers China/domestic MaaS and non-Claude traffic.

title: Anthropic Economic Index
how_used: Context for Claude.ai usage and task-level AI adoption.
limitations: Provider-specific and not a market-wide token ledger.

title: Who on Earth Is Using Generative AI? Global Trends and Shifts in 2025
how_used: Country and regional GenAI web traffic observations, including ChatGPT and China-local tools.
limitations: Traffic visits are not API tokens; web/app panel coverage varies by country.

title: World Bank GenAI Traffic Reproducibility Package
how_used: Reproducibility context for the World Bank GenAI traffic paper.

title: Global AI Adoption 2025 / AI Diffusion Report
how_used: Global AI usage diffusion and country-level adoption contrast.
limitations: Measures diffusion/adoption, not LLM API token volume.

title: 57th Statistical Report on China's Internet Development
how_used: China AI product user scale; used to correct East Asia undercoverage.
limitations: Counts AI product users, not per-user token consumption.

title: Generative AI Patent Landscape Report
how_used: Supply-side and innovation proxy; China/US/East Asia patent concentration.
limitations: Patent volume is not runtime demand.

title: 2025 AI Index Report
how_used: AI investment, notable models, compute, adoption and country comparisons.
limitations: Broad AI signal, not LLM API traffic only.

title: Global AI Vibrancy Tool
how_used: Country-level AI ecosystem strength and readiness proxy.
limitations: Composite index methodology differs from token-demand proxy.

title: Government AI Readiness Index
how_used: Public-sector readiness and governance proxy for regulated AI deployment.
limitations: Government readiness does not equal private token usage.

title: Facts and Figures 2025
how_used: Connectivity and digital-divide baseline for demand ceiling/floor.
limitations: Internet adoption is only a precondition, not GenAI demand.

title: The State of AI: How Organizations Are Rewiring to Capture Value
how_used: Enterprise adoption and agentic AI scaling context.

title: FrugalGPT: How to Use Large Language Models While Reducing Cost and Improving Performance
how_used: Justifies routing/cascade as cost-quality gateway logic.
limitations: Algorithmic evidence; no regional demand estimate.

title: RouteLLM: Learning to Route LLMs with Preference Data
limitations: Routing benchmark evidence, not market sizing.

title: Efficient Memory Management for LLM Serving with PagedAttention
how_used: Serving-side capacity and inference infrastructure context.
